creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->feedback

Would you mind testing with the version of this port that I just 
committed, and if that still fails with another update I plan to 
commit by Monday. 

Given that I have not received more reports on this (I do not have 
an AMD64 system available with FreeBSD), and that the code in question 
is not FreeBSD-specific, I believe this to be related to your system, 
not the port as such.
